sprint.name: UI/UX Stabilization Sprint
sprint.goal: Bring the dashboard UI/UX to a stable, clean, operator-friendly state across the highest-risk surfaces.

stories.title: Desktop analytics drilldown command flow
stories.verification: npm --prefix dashboard run test -- src/components/DrilldownModal.test.jsx src/pages/AnalyticsDrilldownPage.test.jsx; npm --prefix dashboard run lint; npm --prefix dashboard run build; 1920x1080 runtime check overflowX=0 and Views overlay keeps table top stable
stories.notes: Export state, route search hydration, search chip clearing, and table refresh overlay were improved.

stories.title: Admin Users mobile overflow and action discoverability
stories.verification: npm --prefix dashboard run test -- src/styles/responsiveLayout.contract.test.js src/components/AdminUsersModal.test.jsx; 390px runtime check document overflowX=0 and first action button visible in viewport
stories.notes: Mobile user admin rows now become cards so actions are visible without horizontal scrolling.

stories.title: Drilldown mobile document-level overflow
stories.verification: npm --prefix dashboard run test -- src/styles/responsiveLayout.contract.test.js src/components/DrilldownModal.test.jsx; 390px runtime check document overflowX=0 while table-container owns horizontal scroll
stories.notes: Mobile controls are constrained to the viewport; only the data table scrolls horizontally.

stories.title: Mobile analytics vertical scanning reduction
stories.notes: Review finding: mobile Earnings section remains too tall for efficient inspection. Needs a summary-first tab or accordion pattern.

stories.title: Repository hygiene and generated artifact policy
stories.verification: Added .gitignore rules for generated artifacts and removed dist/, test-results/, output/, .playwright-cli/, and .codexai-backups/ with path-scoped cleanup after workspace path verification.
stories.notes: Generated artifacts are now ignored. Source, docs, memory, and project context remain eligible for commit.
